# The Renewer ◆

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Title.*

---

Attach to a **_Gondor_** hero or Aragorn. Attached character gains the **_Healer_** trait.
**Action**: Exhaust The Renewer to choose a questing ally that shares a **_Trait_** with the attached character. Either ready that ally and heal 1 damage from it or give it +1 WP until the end of the phase.

---

> *“The hands of the king are the hands of a healer.”*
> —Ioreth, The Return of the King

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Blood in the Isen]] #186
